p2p_enrich.notes: Added 2 new pass_to_pass repo_tests: test_repo_ruff_format (ruff format --check on models.py and constants.py) and test_repo_constants_importable (verifies DEFAULT_TRUSTED_DOMAINS is importable). Verified ruff check, ruff format, Python syntax, and AST validation all pass on base commit. CI commands tested: ruff check, ruff format --check, py_compile.
